news.paragraph: Arm Holdings has experienced a significant rally, reaching new all-time highs, with recent reports highlighting its substantial 177% surge. Despite this impressive performance, some analysts suggest the stock may have limited upside, citing concerns about its valuation being priced for perpetual growth in a sector with inherent cyclicality. The ongoing surge is fueled by strong demand and Arm's critical role in AI hardware, though questions remain about long-term sustainability.
